HGSS.143.0000:
Well, hello!\f
It’s so freezing, isn’t it?\f
For a youngster like you to be
interested in the Sinjoh Ruins is\r
not something we see every day.\f
Take a look at them.\f
From the design of the pillars at the
Sinjoh Ruins, you can see that the\r
cultures of Sinnoh and Johto\r
have blended.\f
HGSS.143.0001:
What was I thinking?\f
We don’t need to be standing here.
Why don’t you come to the cabin\r
around the corner for more discussion?\f
HGSS.143.0002:
By the way, we happen to have a person
at the cabin.\f
Any Trainer should know who she is.
The famous Trainer from Sinnoh!\f
She is traveling around to study
myths and ancient ruins.\r
Isn’t that something?\f
HGSS.143.0004:
Cynthia: Bring your ARCEUS only.\f
Other Pokémon may get blown away by
the strong power lingering at\r
the ruins.\f
HGSS.143.0005:
Cynthia: It seems your ARCEUS is
resonating in harmony with the Ruins.\f
It might just be me but I can
feel that...\r
we are surrounded by strong power.\f
The answer lies inside the ruins.\f
The place that has been waiting for
its rightful owner, the [FF00,0001]Mystri Stage[FF00,0000]...\f
